messages.content: I need a vegan gluten-free recipe with chickpeas, Indian spices, under 40 minutes
Perfect for your dietary needs! **Chana Masala - Gluten-Free Vegan Chickpea Curry**

data.name: Chana Masala - Gluten-Free Vegan Chickpea Curry
data.description: Authentic North Indian chickpea curry, naturally vegan and gluten-free, packed with protein
steps: Heat oil and add cumin seeds, let them splutter
Add chopped onions and saute until golden brown
Add ginger-garlic paste and green chilies, cook 2 minutes
Add turmeric, coriander powder and cook for 30 seconds
Add pureed tomatoes and cook until oil separates
Add chickpeas and 1 cup water, simmer for 20 minutes
Mash some chickpeas for thicker gravy
Finish with garam masala, cilantro and lemon juice
Serve with gluten-free flatbread or rice
data.sustainability_tip: Outstanding! Chickpeas fix nitrogen in soil, improving farmland health. This meal is 86% below average!

messages.content: Can I use canned chickpeas to save time?

Absolutely! Canned chickpeas work perfectly and save 40-60 minutes of cooking time.

**Tips for canned chickpeas:**
- Rinse thoroughly to remove 40% of sodium
- Use 2 cans (400g each) for this recipe
- Add them later in the cooking process (step 6) since they're already cooked
- Simmer for just 10-15 minutes instead of 20

**CO2 Note:** Canned chickpeas have slightly higher footprint due to processing, but the difference is minimal (~0.05 kg CO2). Still an excellent eco choice!
